chapter_title.en: Chapter on Zihar (declaring one's Wife Unlawful Like a mother)

text: 4840 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ بُكَيْرٍ عَنْ حُمْرَانَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلٌ قَالَ لِأَمَتِهِ أَنْتِ عَلَيَّ كَظَهْرِ أُمِّي يُرِيدُ أَنْ يُرْضِيَ بِذَلِكَ اِمْرَأَتَهُ قَالَ "يَأْتِيهَا وَ لَيْسَ عَلَيْهَا وَ لاَ عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4840 - Abdullah ibn Bukayr narrated from Humran who said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who said to his female slave, "You are to me as the back of my mother," intending by this statement to please his wife.
Imam (as) replied: "He may approach her (the slave), and there is nothing upon her or upon him."
